query_title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert

recommendations.title: A Few Best Men
recommendations.overview: A groom and his three best men travel to the Australian outback for a wedding.

recommendations.title: Easy Virtue
recommendations.overview: A young Englishman marries a glamorous American. When he brings her home to meet the parents, she arrives like a blast from the future - blowing their entrenched British stuffiness out the window.

recommendations.title: Eye of the Beholder
recommendations.overview: A reclusive surveillance expert is hired to spy on a mysterious blackmailer, who just may be a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young transgender man explores his gender identity and searches for love in rural Nebraska.

recommendations.title: All About My Mother
recommendations.overview: Following the tragic death of her teenage son, Manuela travels from Madrid to Barcelona in an attempt to contact the long-estranged father the boy never knew. She reunites with an old friend, an outspoken transgender sex worker, and befriends a troub

recommendations.title: The Birdcage
recommendations.overview: A gay cabaret owner and his drag queen partner agree to put up a false heterosexual front so that their son can introduce them to his fiancée's conservative parents.

recommendations.title: Freaks
recommendations.overview: A circus' beautiful trapeze artist agrees to marry the leader of side-show performers, but his deformed friends discover she is only marrying him for his inheritance.

recommendations.title: Laurence Anyways
recommendations.overview: The story of an impossible love between a woman named Fred and a transgender woman named Laurence who reveals her inner desire to become her true self.

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.

recommendations.title: Boy Meets Girl
recommendations.overview: In Kentucky, a transgender woman and her best male friend lament the lack of eligible partners and step across old boundaries of love and romance.
